# 可持久化平衡树

```cpp
struct FHQ{
    int ls,rs,key,sz,val;
} fhq[N*50];
int root[N],T1,T2,T3,idx;
int newNode(int val=0){
    fhq[++idx]={0,0,(int)rng(),1,val};
    return idx;
}
void pushup(int u){
    fhq[u].sz=fhq[fhq[u].ls].sz+fhq[fhq[u].rs].sz+1;
}
void split(int u,int val,int &x,int &y){
    if(!u){
        x=y=0;
        return;
    }
    if(fhq[u].val>val){
        y=newNode();
        fhq[y]=fhq[u];
        split(fhq[y].ls,val,x,fhq[y].ls);
        pushup(y);
    }
    else{
        x=newNode();
        fhq[x]=fhq[u];
        split(fhq[x].rs,val,fhq[x].rs,y);
        pushup(x);
    }
}
int merge(int x,int y){
    if(!x||!y)return x+y;
    int u=newNode();
    if(fhq[x].key>fhq[y].key){
        fhq[u]=fhq[x];
        fhq[u].rs=merge(fhq[u].rs,y);
        pushup(u);
        return u;
    }
    fhq[u]=fhq[y];
    fhq[u].ls=merge(x,fhq[u].ls);
    pushup(u);
    return u;
}
void insert(int &root,int val){
    split(root,val,T1,T2);
    root=merge(merge(T1,newNode(val)),T2);
}
void erase(int &root,int x){
    split(root,x,T1,T2);
    split(T1,x-1,T1,T3);
    T3=merge(fhq[T3].ls,fhq[T3].rs);
    root=merge(merge(T1,T3),T2);
}
int find_rank(int &root,int x){
    split(root,x-1,T1,T2);
    int res=fhq[T1].sz+1;
    root=merge(T1,T2);
    return res;
}
int kth(int &root,int k){
    int u=root;
    while(u){
        int tmp=fhq[fhq[u].ls].sz+1;
        if(tmp==k)break;
        if(k<tmp)u=fhq[u].ls;
        else{
            k-=tmp;
            u=fhq[u].rs;
        }
    }
    return fhq[u].val;
}
int find_prev(int u,int val){
    if(u==0)return -INF;
    if(fhq[u].val<val){
        int res=find_prev(fhq[u].rs,val);
        return res==-INF?fhq[u].val:res;
    }
    return find_prev(fhq[u].ls,val);
}
int find_next(int u,int val){
    if(u==0)return INF;
    if(fhq[u].val>val){
        int res=find_next(fhq[u].ls,val);
        return res==INF?fhq[u].val:res;
    }
    return find_next(fhq[u].rs,val);
}
```
